zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Swinburne於大約1381年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德卡亞頓時，她的父親Sir William De Swinburne30歲，母親Lady Mary de Heton30歲。她於大約1404年與Robert Horsley在英國諾圖波藍德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1430年在英國享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Swinburne于大约1381年出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德卡亞頓时，她的父亲Sir William De Swinburne30岁，母亲Lady Mary de Heton30岁。她于大约1404年与Robert Horsley在英国諾圖波藍德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1430年在英国享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Swinburne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Durham): habitational name primarily from Great and Little Swinburne (Northumberland), but perhaps also occasionally from one or other places similarly named, from Old English swīn ‘pig’ + burna ‘stream’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Swinburne was born about 1381, in Capheaton, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir William De Swinburne, was 30 and her mother, Lady Mary de Heton, was 30. She married Robert Horsley about 1404, in Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died about 1430, in England, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Swinburne est née environ 1381, à Capheaton, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William De Swinburne, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lady Mary de Heton, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Horsley environ 1404, à Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1430, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Swinburne um 1381 in Capheaton, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William De Swinburne 30 und ihre Mutter Lady Mary de Heton 30. Sie hat um 1404 in Northumberland, England Robert Horsley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb um 1430 im Alter von 51 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Swinburne è nata il circa 1381 nel Capheaton, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir William De Swinburne, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Lady Mary de Heton, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Robert Horsley circa 1404, nel Northumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì circa 1430, nel England, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Swinburneが約1381年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドカフエアトンで生まれた時，父Sir William De Swinburneは30歳，母Lady Mary de Hetonは30歳であった。約1404年にイギリスノースウンバーランドでRobert Horsleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1430年にイギリスで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Swinburne(이)가 대략 1381년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 캡히턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William De Swinburne(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Mary de Heton(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 대략 1404년 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 Robert Horsley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1430년 영국에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Swinburne nasceu aproximadamente 1381, em Capheaton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William De Swinburne, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Lady Mary de Heton, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Horsley aproximadamente 1404, em Northumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1430, em Inglaterra, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Swinburne родилась около 1381 г. в местности кафитон, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir William De Swinburne было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Mary de Heton, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Horsley около 1404 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла около 1430 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Swinburne nació aproximadamente 1381, en Capheaton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William De Swinburne, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Lady Mary de Heton, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Robert Horsley aproximadamente 1404, en Northumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió aproximadamente 1430, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 51 años.
